name: Ingénieur de Siège
description: Technicien de combat chargé de poser les charges de démolition et d'installer les boucliers de poste. Le briseur de murs de l'Hégémonie.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Combat engineer carrying demolition charges and a plasma cutting torch, angular tool harness, placing hexagonal shaped charge on a wall.
